Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: stores by commodity sold [300005286], stores (built works) [300005283], mercantile buildings [300005230], commercial buildings [300005147], single built works by function [300004894], single built works by specific type [300004795], single built works (built environment) [300004790], Single Built Works (hierarchy name) [300004789], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Buildings that house establishments in which works of art are displayed for sale. For buildings where works of art are housed and displayed for public benefit, see "art museums (buildings)."
Úsese únicamente para almacenes en los que se exponen las obras de arte para su venta.

Verwijst in specifieke zin naar winkelpanden waarin voor verkoop bedoelde kunstwerken worden tentoongesteld. Zie 'kunstmusea' voor gebouwen met kunstwerken die uitsluitend voor bezichtiging door het publiek worden tentoongesteld.

Gebäude mit Einrichtungen, in denen Kunstwerke zum Verkauf ausgestellt werden. Für Gebäude, in denen Kunstwerke untergebracht sind und im öffentlichen Interesse gezeigt werden, siehe ["Kunstmuseum (Gebäude)"](300264847).

Edifícios que abrigam estabelecimentos nos quais obras de arte são expostas para venda. Para edifícios onde as obras de arte são alojadas e exibidas para benefício público, consulte "museus de arte (edifícios)."
特指展示並販售藝術品的商店。存放及展示藝術品，供公眾參觀的建築物，參見「美術館」。
Imprese la cui attività consiste nell'esporre in locali dedicati opere d'arte al fine di una loro commercializzazione.

Source.Source_ID: 2000051258/Sturgis y Clayson, Entender la pintura. Análisis y explicación de los temas de las obras (2002)
2000048873/Dewey, Sistema de Clasificación Decimal Dewey e Índice Relativo (2000)
2000115612/經濟部智慧財產局－本國專利技術名詞中英對照查詢資料庫
2000115613/國家教育研究院－雙語詞彙、學術名詞暨辭書資訊網
2000115614/經濟部智慧財產局－本國專利技術名詞中英對照查詢資料庫
